---
title: "KOSPI 붕괴장 수리 분석 (교정판)"
subtitle: "지수감쇠 τ 재검토 · 가속 붕괴 모델 · 기준점 통일"
date: "2026-07-19 13:07 KST"
author: "Claude Opus 4.8 — 독립 재검증"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: true
    toc-title: "목차"
    toc-location: left
    embed-resources: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    fontsize: 1.02em
    mainfont: "system-ui, 'Segoe UI', 'Malgun Gothic', sans-serif"
lang: ko
---

::: {.callout-note}
## 이 보고서의 목적
코덱스 원본 `kospi_math_report_2026-07-19.html`의 **산수는 전부 정확**했다(7개 KPI 소수점까지 일치). 다만 **모델 선택·기준점·정밀도 표기**에 3가지 문제가 있어 이를 교정한 판이다. 밝은톤 Quarto.
:::

## 핵심 결론 (3줄)

1. 최근 코스피는 **감쇠(감속)가 아니라 가속 붕괴** — 주간 낙폭이 −7.1% → −3.8% → −7.6% → **−8.8%**로 마지막 주가 최대다. 지수감쇠 τ는 서술용 평균일 뿐 예측지표로 쓰면 안 된다.
2. 진폭·회복률은 **52주 고점(9,385.59) 하나로 통일**해야 한다 → 종가 낙폭 **−27.3%**, 회복 필요 **+37.6%**.
3. τ는 점 5개 근사라 **95~114일로 흔들린다**. "99.8일"의 소수 정밀도는 과신.

## 교정된 KPI

| 지표 | 코덱스 원본 | 교정판(52주고점 기준) | 비고 |
|---|---|---|---|
| 종가 낙폭 | −24.65% (window시작 기준) | **−27.33%** | 기준을 실제 고점으로 통일 |
| 장중 최대 낙폭 | −31.29% | −31.29% | 동일(원래 52주고점 기준) |
| 회복 필요 반등 | +32.72% | **+37.61%** | 고점 통일 반영 |
| 감쇠 τ | 99.8일 | **≈100일 (95~114)** | 점5개 근사, 신뢰구간 명시 |
| 반감기 | 69.2일 | 69.2일 (τ·ln2) | 내부일관 OK |
| 모델 적합 | exp만 | **가속(2차로그) 우월** R²: 0.977→0.990 | 아래 그래프 |

## 1. 종가 흐름

```{=html}
<svg viewBox="0 0 680 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="system-ui,Arial"><rect width="680" height="360" fill="#ffffff"/><line x1="64" y1="276.52941176470586" x2="650" y2="276.52941176470586" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="280.52941176470586" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">6,500</text><line x1="64" y1="237.41176470588235" x2="650" y2="237.41176470588235" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="241.41176470588235" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">7,000</text><line x1="64" y1="198.29411764705884" x2="650" y2="198.29411764705884" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="202.29411764705884" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">7,500</text><line x1="64" y1="159.1764705882353" x2="650" y2="159.1764705882353" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="163.1764705882353" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">8,000</text><line x1="64" y1="120.05882352941177" x2="650" y2="120.05882352941177" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="124.05882352941177" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">8,500</text><line x1="64" y1="80.94117647058823" x2="650" y2="80.94117647058823" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="84.94117647058823" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">9,000</text><line x1="64" y1="41.823529411764696" x2="650" y2="41.823529411764696" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="45.823529411764696" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">9,500</text><line x1="64" y1="50.774429411764686" x2="650" y2="50.774429411764686" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-dasharray="5 3"/><text x="650" y="45.774429411764686" fill="#b45309" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="end">52주 고점 9,385.59</text><polyline points="84.2,76.8 225.7,127.0 367.1,152.3 508.6,200.2 629.8,251.4" fill="none" stroke="#dc2626" stroke-width="3"/><circle cx="84.2" cy="76.8" r="4.5" fill="#dc2626"/><text x="84.2" y="66.8" fill="#0f172a" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">9,052</text><text x="84.2" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">06-19</text><circle cx="225.7" cy="127.0" r="4.5" fill="#dc2626"/><text x="225.7" y="117.0" fill="#0f172a" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">8,411</text><text x="225.7" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">06-26</text><circle cx="367.1" cy="152.3" r="4.5" fill="#dc2626"/><text x="367.1" y="142.3" fill="#0f172a" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">8,088</text><text x="367.1" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">07-03</text><circle cx="508.6" cy="200.2" r="4.5" fill="#dc2626"/><text x="508.6" y="190.2" fill="#0f172a" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">7,476</text><text x="508.6" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">07-10</text><circle cx="629.8" cy="251.4" r="4.5" fill="#dc2626"/><text x="629.8" y="241.4" fill="#0f172a" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">6,821</text><text x="629.8" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">07-16</text><circle cx="629.8" cy="280.5" r="4" fill="#7c3aed"/><text x="629.8" y="296.5" fill="#6d28d9" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">장중저점 6,449</text><line x1="64" y1="300" x2="650" y2="300" stroke="#64748b"/><line x1="64" y1="34" x2="64" y2="300" stroke="#64748b"/></svg>
```

4주 만에 9,052 → 6,821. 장중 저점은 6,449까지 밀렸다(보라점).

## 2. 왜 "감쇠"가 아니라 "가속"인가

```{=html}
<svg viewBox="0 0 680 340" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="system-ui,Arial"><rect width="680" height="340" fill="#ffffff"/><line x1="64" y1="280.0" x2="650" y2="280.0" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="284.0" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">-10%</text><line x1="64" y1="232.0" x2="650" y2="232.0" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="236.0" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">-8%</text><line x1="64" y1="184.0" x2="650" y2="184.0" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="188.0" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">-6%</text><line x1="64" y1="136.0" x2="650" y2="136.0" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="140.0" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">-4%</text><line x1="64" y1="88.0" x2="650" y2="88.0" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="92.0" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">-2%</text><line x1="64" y1="40.0" x2="650" y2="40.0" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="44.0" fill="#334155" font-size="11" text-anchor="end">0%</text><rect x="98.25" y="40.0" width="78" height="169.99918253903405" fill="#f87171" rx="3"/><text x="137.25" y="225.99918253903405" fill="#fff" font-size="11.5" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">-7.08%</text><text x="137.25" y="296" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">6/19→26</text><rect x="244.75" y="40.0" width="78" height="92.12562758509151" fill="#f87171" rx="3"/><text x="283.75" y="148.1256275850915" fill="#fff" font-size="11.5" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">-3.84%</text><text x="283.75" y="296" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">→7/03</text><rect x="391.25" y="40.0" width="78" height="181.71342945524077" fill="#f87171" rx="3"/><text x="430.25" y="237.71342945524077" fill="#fff" font-size="11.5" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">-7.57%</text><text x="430.25" y="296" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">→7/10</text><rect x="537.75" y="40.0" width="78" height="210.38371094471034" fill="#b91c1c" rx="3"/><text x="576.75" y="266.38371094471034" fill="#fff" font-size="11.5" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">-8.77%</text><text x="576.75" y="296" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">→7/16</text><text x="357.0" y="34" fill="#b91c1c" font-size="12" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="600">▼ 마지막 주 낙폭 최대 = 가속</text><line x1="64" y1="280" x2="650" y2="280" stroke="#64748b"/><line x1="64" y1="40" x2="64" y2="280" stroke="#64748b"/></svg>
```

주간 낙폭이 뒤로 갈수록 커진다. 지수감쇠 모델은 **로그 기울기가 일정(=감속)**임을 전제하는데, 실제는 반대다. 그래서 τ 하나로 "쇼크가 잦아든다"고 읽으면 오독이다.

## 3. 모델 비교 — exp vs 가속(2차 로그)

```{=html}
<svg viewBox="0 0 680 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="system-ui,Arial"><rect width="680" height="360" fill="#ffffff"/><rect x="464.19512195121956" y="34" width="185.80487804878044" height="266" fill="#fef3c7" opacity="0.6"/><text x="557.0975609756098" y="48" fill="#92400e" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="middle">관측 이후(참고)</text><line x1="64" y1="300.0" x2="650" y2="300.0" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="304.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="end">6,000</text><line x1="64" y1="263.05555555555554" x2="650" y2="263.05555555555554" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="267.05555555555554" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="end">6,500</text><line x1="64" y1="226.11111111111111" x2="650" y2="226.11111111111111" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="230.11111111111111" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="end">7,000</text><line x1="64" y1="189.16666666666666" x2="650" y2="189.16666666666666" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="193.16666666666666" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="end">7,500</text><line x1="64" y1="152.22222222222223" x2="650" y2="152.22222222222223" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="156.22222222222223" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="end">8,000</text><line x1="64" y1="115.27777777777777" x2="650" y2="115.27777777777777" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="119.27777777777777" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="end">8,500</text><line x1="64" y1="78.33333333333331" x2="650" y2="78.33333333333331" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="82.33333333333331" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="end">9,000</text><line x1="64" y1="41.388888888888914" x2="650" y2="41.388888888888914" stroke="#e2e8f0"/><text x="56" y="45.388888888888914" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5" text-anchor="end">9,500</text><polyline points="78.3,70.3 85.5,73.7 92.8,77.1 100.0,80.5 107.2,83.8 114.5,87.2 121.7,90.5 129.0,93.8 136.2,97.1 143.4,100.4 150.7,103.6 157.9,106.8 165.1,110.1 172.4,113.3 179.6,116.5 186.8,119.6 194.1,122.8 201.3,125.9 208.6,129.1 215.8,132.2 223.0,135.3 230.3,138.3 237.5,141.4 244.7,144.4 252.0,147.5 259.2,150.5 266.4,153.5 273.7,156.5 280.9,159.4 288.2,162.4 295.4,165.3 302.6,168.3 309.9,171.2 317.1,174.1 324.3,176.9 331.6,179.8 338.8,182.7 346.1,185.5 353.3,188.3 360.5,191.1 367.8,193.9 375.0,196.7 382.2,199.5 389.5,202.2 396.7,205.0 403.9,207.7 411.2,210.4 418.4,213.1 425.7,215.8 432.9,218.5 440.1,221.1 447.4,223.8 454.6,226.4 461.8,229.0 469.1,231.6 476.3,234.2 483.6,236.8 490.8,239.3 498.0,241.9 505.3,244.4 512.5,246.9 519.7,249.5 527.0,252.0 534.2,254.4 541.4,256.9 548.7,259.4 555.9,261.8 563.2,264.3 570.4,266.7 577.6,269.1 584.9,271.5 592.1,273.9 599.3,276.3 606.6,278.6 613.8,281.0 621.1,283.3 628.3,285.6 635.5,288.0 642.8,290.3 650.0,292.6" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2.2"/><polyline points="78.3,79.2 85.5,81.2 92.8,83.3 100.0,85.5 107.2,87.6 114.5,89.9 121.7,92.1 129.0,94.4 136.2,96.8 143.4,99.2 150.7,101.6 157.9,104.1 165.1,106.6 172.4,109.1 179.6,111.7 186.8,114.3 194.1,116.9 201.3,119.6 208.6,122.4 215.8,125.1 223.0,127.9 230.3,130.7 237.5,133.6 244.7,136.5 252.0,139.4 259.2,142.4 266.4,145.4 273.7,148.4 280.9,151.4 288.2,154.5 295.4,157.6 302.6,160.7 309.9,163.9 317.1,167.1 324.3,170.3 331.6,173.5 338.8,176.8 346.1,180.1 353.3,183.4 360.5,186.7 367.8,190.1 375.0,193.5 382.2,196.9 389.5,200.3 396.7,203.7 403.9,207.2 411.2,210.6 418.4,214.1 425.7,217.6 432.9,221.2 440.1,224.7 447.4,228.3 454.6,231.8 461.8,235.4 469.1,239.0 476.3,242.6 483.6,246.2 490.8,249.9 498.0,253.5 505.3,257.2 512.5,260.8 519.7,264.5 527.0,268.2 534.2,271.9 541.4,275.6 548.7,279.3 555.9,283.0 563.2,286.7 570.4,290.4 577.6,294.1 584.9,297.8 592.1,301.6 599.3,305.3 606.6,309.0 613.8,312.7 621.1,316.5 628.3,320.2 635.5,323.9 642.8,327.7 650.0,331.4" fill="none" stroke="#059669" stroke-width="2.2"/><circle cx="78.3" cy="74.5" r="4.5" fill="#0f172a"/><circle cx="178.3" cy="121.8" r="4.5" fill="#0f172a"/><circle cx="278.4" cy="145.7" r="4.5" fill="#0f172a"/><circle cx="378.4" cy="190.9" r="4.5" fill="#0f172a"/><circle cx="464.2" cy="239.4" r="4.5" fill="#0f172a"/><text x="78.3" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">06-19</text><text x="178.3" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">06-26</text><text x="278.4" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">07-03</text><text x="378.4" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">07-10</text><text x="464.2" y="316.0" fill="#334155" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">07-16</text><rect x="72" y="33" width="13" height="9" fill="#3b82f6"/><text x="90" y="42" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5">지수감쇠 exp(τ)  R²=0.977</text><rect x="72" y="48" width="13" height="9" fill="#059669"/><text x="90" y="57" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5">가속 2차로그  R²=0.990</text><rect x="72" y="63" width="13" height="9" fill="#0f172a"/><text x="90" y="72" fill="#334155" font-size="10.5">실제 종가</text><line x1="64" y1="300" x2="650" y2="300" stroke="#64748b"/><line x1="64" y1="34" x2="64" y2="300" stroke="#64748b"/></svg>
```

같은 5점에 지수감쇠(파랑)와 2차 로그(초록)를 적합하면 **2차 로그가 더 잘 맞는다**(R² 0.977 → 0.990, 곡률 c=-1.48e-04<0 = 아래로 휨 = 가속). 지수감쇠는 최근 하락을 **과소평가**한다.

::: {.callout-warning}
## 두 모델 다 예측용이 아님
점 5개짜리 국면 적합이다. 오른쪽 연장(연노랑 영역)은 **참고선일 뿐** 목표가가 아니다. 바닥/추세 반전은 반등 데이터가 쌓여야 판정 가능.
:::

## 4. 회복 비대칭 (중요)

낙폭 −27.3%를 되돌리려면 **+37.6%**가 필요하다(고점 기준). 하락률과 회복률은 대칭이 아니다 — 이게 손실 관리가 예측보다 중요한 수학적 이유다. 우리 500일 게이트의 **MDD·손익비** 지표와 직결된다.

## 5. 사용 데이터

- 종가: 2026-06-19 **9,052.42** → 06-26 **8,411.21** → 07-03 **8,088.34** → 07-10 **7,475.94** → 07-16 **6,820.60**
- 극값: 52주 고점 **9,385.59**, 07-16 장중 저점 **6,448.86**
- 검증: 07-10 종가가 우리 내부 대결기록(7,475.94)과 **정확히 일치** → 실데이터 확인. (07-16값은 독립 재확인 불가)

::: {.callout-tip}
## 실전 권고
τ·반감기는 **서술 요약**으로만 쓰고, 리스크룰 수치는 회복 비대칭(+37.6%)과 MDD로 잡아라. 예쁜 재포장보다 **모델 형태를 맞추는 게** 먼저다.
:::

---
*Generated by Claude Opus 4.8 · Quarto {{< version >}} · KIS 500일 게이트 프로젝트*
